titel: Reports from the Swedish Parliament to the government – actions planned for 2025.
html: In the document, the government provides an account of the measures it has taken in response to the parliamentary reports submitted to the government. This account primarily covers actions taken during the period of January 1 to December 31, 2025. Additionally, the government provides certain information regarding the number of currently valid regulations.
tldr: The government reports on the actions it has taken following instructions received from the parliament in 2025. It also provides information on the number of laws currently in effect.
lattlast:
The government is preparing a document for the Parliament to report on its activities during the year 2025. The document concerns the instructions or directives that the Parliament has issued to the government during the period between January 1st and December 31st.

In this document, the government explains the specific actions it has taken to comply with the decisions made by the Parliament. This serves as a way for the government to demonstrate that it is actively working on the tasks assigned to it.

In addition to describing its actions, the government also provides information on the number of laws and regulations, known as statutes, that are in effect. This is done to provide a clear picture of the legal landscape during the year.
